name: ivintik
description: iVintik's private Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: game-test
plugins.description: AI-driven game testing with TITAN-inspired agent architecture. Automates Unity game testing via HTTP Bridge SDK — state inspection, action scripting, coverage tracking, visual regression, and autonomous exploration.

plugins.name: plugin-ops
plugins.description: Plugin lifecycle management — issue tracking, health audits, optimization, fixing, releasing, and marketplace operations for Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: famdeck-toolkit
plugins.description: Setup and project init for Claude Code tools — Context7, Serena, Beads, Agent Mail, Atlas, Relay, Codeman

plugins.name: famdeck-atlas
plugins.description: Project registry & awareness across all Claude sessions — discover, cache, and serve project metadata via MCP tools

plugins.name: famdeck
plugins.description: Autonomous development toolkit — autopilot, quality gates, story validation, autonomy assessment

plugins.name: famdeck-relay
plugins.description: Cross-project issue routing & work handoff — route issues to GitHub/GitLab/Jira, transfer work between sessions and people

plugins.name: codeharness
plugins.description: Makes autonomous coding agents produce software that actually works — real-world verification, observability, and mechanical enforcement via Claude Code hooks.
